siteSettings.title: Site Settings
siteSettings.description: Manage site-wide configuration and system options
siteSettings.securityDescription: User registration, account security, and access control settings

notifications.title: Notification Channels
notifications.description: Configure email, DingTalk and other notification channels

autoNotifications.title: Auto Notifications
autoNotifications.description: Configure which system events trigger automatic notifications and which channels to use
autoNotifications.globalChannelsDesc: Select which channels to use for sending external notifications (applies to all enabled notification types)
autoNotifications.noChannelsConfigured: No notification channels are configured. Please configure channels in the other tabs first.

categories.teamDesc: Notifications related to team membership changes
categories.userDesc: Notifications related to user account changes
categories.apikeyDesc: Notifications related to API key expiration

types.team_member_addedDesc: Notify when a new member is added to a team
types.team_member_removedDesc: Notify when a member is removed from a team
types.team_role_changedDesc: Notify when a member's role is changed
types.team_ownership_transferredDesc: Notify when team ownership is transferred
types.team_model_grantedDesc: Notify when a model is authorized for the team
types.team_model_revokedDesc: Notify when a model authorization is revoked from the team
types.user_activatedDesc: Notify when a user account is activated
types.user_deactivatedDesc: Notify when a user account is deactivated
types.user_password_resetDesc: Notify when a user's password is reset by admin
types.user_pending_approvalDesc: Notify admins when a new user registration requires approval
types.kb_doc_indexedDesc: Notify when a document is successfully indexed
types.workflow_run_successDesc: Notify when a workflow run completes successfully
types.workflow_run_failedDesc: Notify when a workflow run fails
types.agent_publishedDesc: Notify when an agent is published
types.agent_unpublishedDesc: Notify when an agent is unpublished
types.apikey_expiringDesc: Notify when an API key is about to expire
types.apikey_expiredDesc: Notify when an API key has expired
types.security_login_anomalyDesc: Notify when suspicious login activity is detected
types.security_account_lockedDesc: Notify when an account is locked due to failed login attempts
types.security_password_changedDesc: Notify when a user changes their password

email.smtpUsernamePlaceholder: Optional, leave blank if not required
email.smtpPasswordPlaceholder: Optional, leave blank if not required
email.testEmailDesc: Send a test email to verify configuration

dingtalk.notificationTypeDesc: Choose between Webhook robot or enterprise internal app
dingtalk.webhookUrlDesc: Get from DingTalk group robot settings
dingtalk.testMessageDesc: Send a test message to verify DingTalk configuration

wechat.notificationTypeDesc: Choose between Webhook robot or enterprise app
wechat.webhookUrlDesc: Get from WeChat Work group robot settings
wechat.testMessageDesc: Send a test message to verify WeChat Work configuration
wechat.testSent: Test WeChat Work message sent successfully

feishu.notificationTypeDesc: Choose between Webhook robot or enterprise app
feishu.webhookUrlDesc: Get from Feishu group robot settings
feishu.testMessageDesc: Send a test message to verify Feishu configuration

webhook.urlDesc: The URL to send notifications to
webhook.advancedSettingsDesc: Configure custom headers and body template
webhook.headersDesc: JSON object of custom HTTP headers
webhook.testMessageDesc: Send a test message to verify webhook configuration

slack.webhookUrlDesc: Get from Slack app incoming webhooks settings
slack.testMessageDesc: Send a test message to verify Slack configuration

siteSettings.testEmailRequired: Please enter a test email address
siteSettings.siteIconDescription: Used in browser tabs and sidebar
siteSettings.defaultLanguageDescription: Default language for system messages and notifications
siteSettings.allowRegistrationDescription: Allow new users to register accounts
siteSettings.allowAccountDeletionDescription: Allow users to delete their own account
siteSettings.requireApprovalDescription: New users require admin approval before they can use the system
siteSettings.emailVerificationDescription: Require users to verify their email address
siteSettings.defaultRoleDescription: The role automatically assigned to new users upon registration
siteSettings.requireUppercaseDescription: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
siteSettings.requireNumberDescription: Password must contain at least one number
siteSettings.requireSpecialCharDescription: Password must contain at least one special character
siteSettings.singleSessionDescription: Limit users to one device at a time
siteSettings.testEmailDescription: Send a test email to verify configuration
siteSettings.auditLogStorageDescription: Configure audit log retention and archiving
siteSettings.auditLogRetentionDaysHint: Logs older than this will be archived (30-3650 days)
siteSettings.auditLogArchivePathHint: Directory path where archived logs will be stored
siteSettings.manualArchiveDescription: Manually trigger archiving of old audit logs
siteSettings.archiveNowHint: Archive logs older than the retention period
siteSettings.confirmArchiveDescription: This will archive all audit logs older than {days} days. Archived logs will be exported to JSON files and removed from the database. Continue?
siteSettings.enableSSODescription: Allow users to sign in using SSO providers
siteSettings.allowPasswordLoginDescription: Allow users to sign in with username and password when SSO is enabled
siteSettings.autoCreateUsersDescription: Automatically create user accounts on first SSO login
siteSettings.ssoRequireApprovalDescription: Require admin approval for new SSO users
siteSettings.matchByEmailDescription: Match SSO users to existing accounts by email address
